issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit step-by-step guidance, making them ambiguous.
The skill does not address error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Gapminder bubble chart with continent color and population size
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses px.data.gapminder().query and px.scatter with size, color, log_x, and size_max exactly as documented; baseline reaches for matplotlib or graph_objects and misses the built-in dataset.

scenarios.name: Plotly.js browser revenue chart with currency hover and small bundle
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports plotly.js-dist-min and uses Plotly.newPlot with hovertemplate %{y:,.0f}, tickformat $,.0f, and hovermode x unified; baseline ships the full plotly.js bundle and a plain hover string.
